name: Super Crunchy Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 4 cups of popcorn.
2. Add 2 cups of Super Golden Crisp cereal to the popcorn.
3. Pour in 2 cups of mini marshmallows.
4. Sprinkle 2 cups of semi-sweet chocolate pieces over the mixture.
5. Toss in 1 cup of peanuts.
6. Finally, add 1 cup of raisins.
7. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
